name: . ۫ 在 ི۪۪  HAECHAN
description:
"Your heart’s too big for your body, it’s why it won’t fit inside”

- (🧸) Crybaby, Melanie Martinez

Haechan was always teased for how sensitive he always was. It was unavoidable to see him get teary eyed; especially in your friend group that had a knack for targeting him with teases and taunts.

What always hurt most was that it was usually you who started to tease him.

So when you tease him at a get together, it all goes to shit when you come back home to your shared apartment.
